text: A pillow is a soft support used for the head, neck, back, or body
original_text: A pillow is a soft support used for the head, neck, back, or body.

text: pillows can be filled with foam, feathers, fibers, latex, or other materials
original_text: Pillows can be filled with foam, feathers, fibers, latex, or other materials.

text: A pillow can affect sleep posture, comfort, and neck support
original_text: A pillow can affect sleep posture, comfort, and neck support.

text: decorative pillows exist mostly to be moved before sitting or sleeping
original_text: Decorative pillows exist mostly to be moved before sitting or sleeping.
The meatball considers pillows soft bricks for dreams.
